SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_INP_COINS_OS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 

COMMENT: 
This variable was only populated from 2007–2012. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a 
coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding co-payment 
variable called (PRE_ICL_INP_COPAY_OS). 
The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file
